description: Create a U-shaped building with three connected flat-roofed wings and place south-facing tilted solar panels on all three roof sections using the Skelion plugin. Building Specs: Back Wing (north) is 80ft E-W x 25ft N-S x 15ft tall. Left Wing (west) is 25ft E-W x 50ft N-S x 15ft tall, attached to the west end of the back wing extending south. Right Wing (east) is 25ft E-W x 50ft N-S x 15ft tall, attached to the east end of the back wing extending south. The resulting courtyard opening should face south. Panel Configuration: Use Skelion to place landscape-oriented panels, tilted at 10 degrees, facing south (azimuth 180). Place arrays on all three wing rooftops. Save the final model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\courtyard_solar.skp'.
